about.title: About UP Final
about.subtitle: A local-first fitness assessment app focused on clear scoring and long-term progress tracking.
about.missionBody: We build practical fitness scoring tools that stay transparent, deterministic, and useful in everyday training decisions.
about.disclaimerBody: UP Final is a fitness self-tracking product and does not provide medical diagnosis, treatment, or emergency guidance.
about.contactBody: For product questions or feedback, use the official support channel provided inside the app.
